svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ VERIFICATION vs IDENTIFICATION │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
VERIFICATION (1:1) IDENTIFICATION (1:N) ────────────────── ────────────────────
andquot;Is this person who they claim to be?andquot; andquot;Who is this person?andquot;
Query Claimed ID Query Database ┌───┐ ┌───┐ ┌───┐ ┌───┬───┬───┐ │ 😊 │ vs │ 😊 │ → Match? │ 😊 │ vs │😀│😊│😐│ └───┘ └───┘ └───┘ └───┴───┴───┘ │ Output: True/False Output: Best match or andquot;Unknownandquot;
Use case: Phone unlock, Use case: Surveillance, Access control Photo tagging
Threshold selection: ──────────────────── • Verification: Single threshold, balance FAR/FRR • Identification: Threshold + ranking, handle unknown faces
FAR (False Accept Rate): Impostors accepted FRR (False Reject Rate): Genuine users rejected
